scenario: golden path — code has grown beyond CONTEXT.md
expected_behavior: Skill should: (1) read CONTEXT.md and extract baseline 3 terms, (2) scan code and find 6 terms including 3 new ones (Cart, Checkout, Fulfillment), (3) for each undocumented term show file:line and inferred meaning, (4) challenge user one at a time, (5) on confirmation write approved additions to CONTEXT.md Language section only

scenario: contradicted term — code usage conflicts with CONTEXT.md definition

input.context_md_definition: A document sent to a customer after payment is received
input.code_usage: Invoice is created before payment and used as the payment request

expected_behavior: Skill should surface the contradiction: show CONTEXT.md definition vs code usage, ask user which is correct. If user updates CONTEXT.md — update Language section. If user says code is wrong — mark as CODE SMELL and recommend review but do NOT change CONTEXT.md

scenario: stale term — exists in CONTEXT.md but not in any code
expected_behavior: Skill should flag 'LegacyImport' as Stale — exists in CONTEXT.md but not found in code. Ask user: 'This term is documented but not used in code — intentionally kept for historical reference, or safe to remove?' Do NOT remove without explicit approval

scenario: should redirect — CONTEXT.md does not exist
expected_behavior: Skill should stop at Step 0 and redirect: 'This skill requires an existing CONTEXT.md. Please run /s1-config-context first.'
